accept_dispute.description: Accepts a dispute and returns a payload that includes the dispute that was accepted. Only disputes with a status of OPEN can be accepted.

apple_pay_registered_domains.description: Retrieves a list of domains registered with Apple for Apple Pay.

authorize_credit_card.description: Authorize a credit card of any origin and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

authorize_in_store_credit_card.description: Authorize an in-store credit card and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

authorize_pay_pal_account.description: Authorize an eligible PayPal account and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

authorize_payment_method.description: Authorize an eligible payment method and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

authorize_venmo_account.description: Authorize an eligible Venmo account and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

capture_transaction.description: Capture an authorized transaction and return a payload that includes details of the transaction.

charge_credit_card.description: Charge a credit card of any origin and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

charge_in_store_credit_card.description: Charge an in-store credit card and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

charge_pay_pal_account.description: Charge a PayPal account and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

charge_payment_method.description: Charge any payment method and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction.

charge_us_bank_account.description: Charge a US bank account and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction. See https://developers.braintreepayments.com/guides/ach/configuration for information on eligibilit...

charge_venmo_account.description: Charge a Venmo account and return a payload that includes details of the resulting transaction. See https://articles.braintreepayments.com/guides/payment-methods/venmo for information on eligibilit...

client_configuration.description: The client-side environment and payment method configuration.

confirm_micro_transfer_amounts.description: Confirm micro-transfer amounts initiated by vaultUsBankAccount or verifyUsBankAccount, completing the verification process for a US Bank Account via micro-transfer.

create_apple_pay_web_session.description: Creates an Apple Pay web session for domain validation.

create_client_token.description: Create a client token that can be used to initialize a client in order to tokenize payment information.

create_customer.description: Create a customer for storing individual customer information and/or grouping transactions and multi-use payment methods.

create_dispute_file_evidence.description: Uploads an evidence file and associates it with a dispute. **Note:**: file upload requires a special request format. See the ['Uploading Files' integration guide](https://graphql.braintreepayments....

create_dispute_text_evidence.description: Creates text evidence to a dispute and returns a payload that includes the evidence that was created. Only disputes with a status of OPEN can have text evidence created for them.

create_in_store_location.description: Creates a new In-Store Location to associate Readers.

create_local_payment_context.description: Creates a local payment context. Your account must be enabled to use this feature.

create_non_instant_local_payment_context.display_name: Create Non Instant Local Payment Context
create_non_instant_local_payment_context.description: Creates a non-instant local payment context. Your account must be enabled to use this feature.

create_o_auth_client_secret.description: Create an OAuth client secret. To call this mutation you must obtain an OAuth Access Token with scope MANAGE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRETS, the associated merchant must have [IP or hostname restrictions](ht...

create_offline_declined_transaction.description: Create an EMV chip declined transaction and return a payload that includes details of the created transaction.

create_pay_pal_billing_agreement.description: Set up a PayPal Billing Agreement Token for approval by a PayPal user.

create_pay_pal_one_time_payment.display_name: Create Pay Pal One Time Payment
create_pay_pal_one_time_payment.description: Set up a PayPal One-Time Payment for approval by a PayPal user. See [documentation](https://developer.paypal.com/braintree/docs/guides/paypal/checkout-with-paypal) for more information. Your accoun...

create_transaction_package_tracking.description: Creates a package tracker record for Pay with PayPal transactions. Your account must be enabled to use this feature.

create_transaction_risk_context.description: Create a transaction context for risk assessment purposes.

create_universal_access_token.description: Create a PayPal access token that can be used to make additional API calls or initialize a client.

delete_customer.description: Delete a customer, breaking association between any of the customer's transactions. Will not delete if the customer has existing payment methods.

delete_o_auth_client_secret.description: Delete a disabled OAuth client secret. To call this mutation you must obtain an OAuth Access Token with scope MANAGE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRETS, the associated merchant must have [IP or hostname restrict...

delete_payment_method_from_single_use_to.display_name: Delete Payment Method From Single Use Token
delete_payment_method_from_single_use_to.description: Delete a payment method referenced by a single-use token.

delete_payment_method_from_vault.description: Delete a multi-use payment method from the vault.

disable_o_auth_client_secret.description: Disable an OAuth client secret. To call this mutation you must obtain an OAuth Access Token with scope MANAGE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRETS, the associated merchant must have [IP or hostname restrictions](h...

evaluate_transaction_risk.description: Evaluates the risk of a transaction and return a payload that includes details of the risk evaluation.

finalize_dispute.description: Finalizes a dispute and returns a payload that includes the dispute that was finalized. Only disputes with a status of OPEN can be finalized.

generate_edit_funding_instrument_url.description: Generates an edit funding instrument URL.

generate_exchange_rate_quote.description: Generate a customized currency exchange rate quote for items on a merchant's page. This allows merchants to advertise products in their customer's currency. Your account must be enabled to use this...

id_from_legacy_id.description: Get a GraphQL ID from a legacy ID that was returned from an SDK or a legacyId field. Does not verify existence except for payment methods.

in_store_locations.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all in-store locations.

pair_in_store_reader.description: Pairs a Reader to an account and In-Store Location.

partial_capture_transaction.description: Partially capture funds from a transaction that was successfully authorized and return a payload that includes a new transaction with information about the capture. This is available for [Venmo](ht...

paypal_billing_agreement_details.description: Returns the details of the billing agreement.

paypal_order_details.description: Returns the details of the PayPal order.

perform_three_d_secure_lookup.description: Attempt to perform 3D Secure Authentication on credit card payment method. This may consume the payment method and return a new single-use payment method.

ping_in_store_reader.description: Triggers a beep on a connected Reader and returns the Reader information or an error if unable to ping the device.

refund_credit_card.description: Create a detached refund (unassociated with any previous Braintree payment) to a credit card and return a payload that includes details of the refund. We have previously referred to this as issuing...

refund_in_store_credit_card.description: Create a detached refund (unassociated with any previous Braintree payment) to an in-store credit card and return a payload that includes details of the refund.

refund_transaction.description: Refund a settled transaction and return a payload that includes details of the refund.

refund_us_bank_account.description: Create a detached refund (unassociated with any previous Braintree payment) to a US Bank Account and return a payload that includes details of the refund. We have previously referred to this as iss...

register_apple_pay_domains.description: Registers one or more domains for Apple Pay.

report.description: A collection of the available reports. Each field on the `Report` type is a different report that can be queried with its own input parameters.

request_amount_prompt_from_in_store_read.display_name: Request Amount Prompt From In Store Reader
request_amount_prompt_from_in_store_read.description: Request an in-store reader to display an amount prompt. Only supported on payment application versions >= 5.2.0.

request_authorize_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Authorize From In Store Reader
request_authorize_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to begin the authorize flow. Only supported on payment application versions >= 5.1.0.

request_cancel_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Cancel From In Store Reader
request_cancel_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to cancel the charge flow.

request_charge_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Charge From In Store Reader
request_charge_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to begin the charge flow.

request_confirmation_prompt_from_in_stor.display_name: Request Confirmation Prompt From In Store Reader
request_confirmation_prompt_from_in_stor.description: Request an in-store reader to display a confirmation prompt. Only supported on payment application versions >= 3.3.0.

request_firmware_update_from_in_store_re.display_name: Request Firmware Update From In Store Reader
request_firmware_update_from_in_store_re.description: Request an in-store reader to update to the latest version of software.

request_item_display_from_in_store_reade.display_name: Request Item Display From In Store Reader
request_item_display_from_in_store_reade.description: Request an in-store reader to display line items.

request_multi_choice_single_select_promp.display_name: Request Multi Choice Single Select Prompt From In Store Reader
request_multi_choice_single_select_promp.description: Request an in-store reader to display a multi-choice single-select prompt. Only supported on payment application versions >= 5.4.0.

request_non_pci_card_data_from_in_store_.display_name: Request Non Pci Card Data From In Store Reader
request_non_pci_card_data_from_in_store_.description: Request an in-store reader to collect non [PCI-scoped](https://www.braintreepayments.com/blog/understanding-pci-dss-compliance) card data. Only supported on payment application versions >= 5.2.0.

request_print_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Print From In Store Reader
request_print_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to print content. Only supported on the Verifone V400m device using payment application version >= 5.5.0.

request_refund_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Refund From In Store Reader
request_refund_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to start an unreferenced refund flow.

request_signature_prompt_from_in_store_r.display_name: Request Signature Prompt From In Store Reader
request_signature_prompt_from_in_store_r.description: Request an in-store reader to display a signature prompt. Only supported on payment application versions >= 3.3.0.

request_text_display_from_in_store_reade.display_name: Request Text Display From In Store Reader
request_text_display_from_in_store_reade.description: Request an in-store reader to display text.

request_text_prompt_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Text Prompt From In Store Reader
request_text_prompt_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to display a text prompt. Only supported on payment application versions >= 5.2.0.

request_vault_from_in_store_reader.display_name: Request Vault From In Store Reader
request_vault_from_in_store_reader.description: Request an in-store reader to vault a payment method.

reverse_emv_transaction.description: Reverse an EMV card declined transaction and return a payload that includes the voided transaction.

reverse_refund.description: Reverse a refund and return a payload that includes voided refund.

reverse_transaction.description: Reverse a transaction and return a payload that includes either the voided transaction or a refund.

sandbox_settle_transaction.description: Force a transaction to settle in the sandbox environment. Generates an error elsewhere.

search.description: A collection of the available searches. Each field on the `Search` type is a different search that can be queried with its own input parameters.

tokenize_apple_pay_card.description: Tokenize Apple Pay card fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_credit_card.description: Tokenize credit card fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_custom_actions_payment_method.description: Tokenize Custom Actions fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_cvv.description: Tokenize a credit card's CVV and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_emv_card.description: Tokenize EMV credit card fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_magstripe_card.description: Tokenize magstripe credit card fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_network_token.description: Tokenize a network tokenized payment instrument and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_pay_pal_billing_agreement.description: Tokenize PayPal account and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_pay_pal_one_time_payment.display_name: Tokenize Pay Pal One Time Payment
tokenize_pay_pal_one_time_payment.description: Tokenize PayPal One-Time Payment and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_samsung_pay_card.description: Tokenize Samsung Pay card fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_us_bank_account.description: Tokenize US bank account fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

tokenize_us_bank_login.description: Tokenize US bank login fields and return a payload that includes a single-use payment method.

unregister_apple_pay_domain.description: Unregisters a domain from Apple Pay.

update_credit_card_billing_address.description: Set a new billing address for a multi-use credit card payment method. By default, this mutation will also verify the card with the new billing address before updating.

update_credit_card_cardholder_name.description: Set a new cardholder name for a multi-use credit card payment method. By default, this mutation will also verify the card with the new cardholder name before updating.

update_credit_card_expiration_date.description: Set a new expiration date for a multi-use credit card payment method. By default, this mutation will also verify the card with the new expiration date before updating.

update_custom_fields.description: Update custom fields on a transaction or refund. Custom fields are [defined in the Control Panel](https://articles.braintreepayments.com/control-panel/custom-fields#store-and-pass-back-fields).

update_emv_capture_data.description: Updates EMV data necessary to capture an EMV contact transaction.

update_pay_pal_one_time_payment.display_name: Update Pay Pal One Time Payment
update_pay_pal_one_time_payment.description: Update a PayPal one-time payment with revised amount, line items, and shipping details.

update_transaction_amount.description: Updates the authorization amount of the transaction.

update_transaction_custom_fields.description: Update custom fields on a transaction. Custom fields are [defined in the Control Panel](https://articles.braintreepayments.com/control-panel/custom-fields#store-and-pass-back-fields).

vault_credit_card.description: Vault payment information from a single-use credit card and return a payload that includes a new multi-use payment method. By default, this mutation will also verify the card before vaulting.

vault_pay_pal_billing_agreement.description: Vault an existing PayPal Billing Agreement that was not created through Braintree. Only use this mutation if you need to import PayPal Billing Agreements from an existing PayPal integration into yo...

vault_payment_method.description: Vault payment information from a single-use payment method and return a payload that includes a new multi-use payment method. When vaulting a credit card, by default, this mutation will also verify...

vault_us_bank_account.description: Vault payment information from a single-use US bank account payment method and return a payload that includes a new multi-use payment method.

verify_credit_card.description: Run a verification on a multi-use credit card payment method.

verify_payment_method.description: Run a verification on a multi-use payment method.

verify_us_bank_account.description: Run a verification on a multi-use US bank account payment method.

void_transaction.description: Void a transaction and return a payload that includes details of the voided transaction.
